case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. OLIVEROS HERNANDO ET AL

docket_entries.description: CRC 3.740 REVIEW
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-18-2020 CONTINUED TO NOV-17-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $17.62 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 66552250) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100044207), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED APR-10-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDO, OLIVEROS
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-16-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $258.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 66297708) AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDO, OLIVEROS
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-09-2021 CONTINUED TO MAY-11-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $81.81 INTEREST, $40.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 67046629) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDO, OLIVEROS DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-02-2019
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-17-2020 CONTINUED TO FEB-09-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDO, OLIVEROS $1,028.33 PRINCIPAL, $258.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,287.28, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-16-2020 CONTINUED TO AUG-18-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 66297708) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66297708) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT (TRANSACTION ID # 66297708) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-11-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDO, OLIVEROS
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDO, OLIVEROS
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDO, OLIVEROS
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDO, OLIVEROS
